prose: Aniline frontier-orbital gap calculated via DFT using B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier standard, density-fitted) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry was user-supplied (14 atoms). SCF converged after 9 cycles. HOMO = −5.554 eV, LUMO = −0.249 eV, **HOMO–LUMO gap = 5.305 eV**. The gap reflects the electron-donating effect of the amino group on the aromatic π-system. Koopmans ionization potential = 5.554 eV; electron affinity = 0.249 eV. Calculation command: `frontier --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --charge 0 --mult 1 aniline.xyz`.
